settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content: Free shipping on orders over ₹899. Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Easy 7-day returns on unworn items with tags attached.

settings.title: Care Instructions
settings.content: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Cool iron if needed.

settings.title: About the Brand
settings.content: Tokiyo Lifestyle is a premium Indian fashion label committed to quality craftsmanship and sustainable practices.
